hero.headline: *Same-day lawn service* — we show up when we say we will
hero.subheadline: Professional lawn care in Columbia with rates that actually make sense. Call today, get your quote, get it done today.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Lawn Care That Gets Done Right
services_section.subheading: From weekly maintenance to natural edges and mulch installation

services.title: Weekly Lawn Maintenance
services.description: Mowing, trimming, and edging to keep your yard looking clean and neat every week. Professional results without the professional hassle.

services.title: Natural Edge Installation
services.description: Clean, defined borders that separate your lawn from flower beds and walkways. Precise work that makes your landscaping pop.

services.title: Mulch Installation
services.description: Fresh mulch spread evenly around trees, shrubs, and garden beds. Protects plants and gives your property that finished look.

services.title: Cleanup & Trimming
services.description: Overgrown areas, seasonal cleanup, and detailed trimming work. We handle the mess so your yard stays looking sharp.

about.heading: Andre and the Oliver's Lawn Care Team
about.body: We're the Columbia lawn care company that actually shows up when promised. Professional service, same-day availability, and rates that won't break the bank. Our clients appreciate the quality work and flexible scheduling — we make lawn care easy for busy homeowners across the Columbia area.

reviews.name: Denise H.
reviews.text: Really happy with the results. He showed up last minute when I needed an appointment, was very professional, and got the job done quickly. The yard looks clean and well-trimmed.

reviews.name: Sherman L.
reviews.text: Very professional and reliable. The lawn work he did for my residence was amazing!

reviews.name: Cyndi L.
reviews.text: Andre does a great job and always goes above and beyond. He's so flexible and easy to work with, and his rates can't be beat. Couldn't be happier with his work ethic.

service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia and Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional lawn care throughout the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready for a Lawn That Actually Looks Good?
cta.body: Get your quote today and see why Columbia homeowners choose Oliver's Lawn Care for professional service at rates that make sense.
